selection.chart1_parity_gate_note: Rows with absent/null Chart No.1 exact-crop evidence may pass only as automated rerun evidence; final approval remains 0.
selection.selection_note: All repaired rows from owned_repair_batch20; visual rerun only, no human-final approval claimed.

verdicts.expected: QUAPOS01 is position approximate. It is used as a position approximate. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Automated visual rerun pass only. No Chart No.1 exact-crop/manual final approval evidence is present, so final human approval remains blocked.
verdicts.observed: Candidate presents the black PA approximate-position text cue with a short dashed baseline; this preserves the required PA class cue seen in S-101/OpenCPN, with only Helm styling/scale differences.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this automated visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: QUARRY01 is quarry. It is used as a quarry. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a brown hourglass/cross with top and bottom bars; S-101/OpenCPN show the quarry as crossed tool/hash geometry inside a compact circular witness, not an hourglass frame.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw QUARRY01 as the compact brown quarry crossed-tool/hash symbol inside the reference circular witness; remove the hourglass top/bottom bars.

It is used as a object which is not sufficiently described to be symbolized, or for which no symbol exists in the symbol library. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Automated visual rerun pass only. No Chart No.1 exact-crop/manual final approval evidence is present, so final human approval remains blocked.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is the magenta question-mark cue with a small base/underline, matching the S-101/OpenCPN unknown-object/question-mark semantics.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this automated visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: RACNSP01 is symbol indicating this object is radar conspicuous. It is used as a symbol indicating this object is radar conspicuous. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Automated visual rerun pass only. No Chart No.1 exact-crop/manual final approval evidence is present, so final human approval remains blocked.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta radar-conspicuous starburst/radiating mark with center cue. S-101 uses a larger ringed starburst, but the symbol class, color family, and radial cue are preserved for automated rerun pass.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this automated visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: RADRFL03 is radar reflector. It is used as a radar reflector. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate follows a black reflector/arc motif similar to the AquaMap support image, but S-101/OpenCPN render this row as a magenta radar-reflector/conspicuous starburst witness.
verdicts.required_change: Resolve the provider conflict and redraw RADRFL03 to the S-101/OpenCPN magenta starburst/ring witness, or record an explicit manual exception choosing the AquaMap reflector motif before rerun pass.

verdicts.expected: RASCAN01 is radar scanner. It is used as a radar scanner. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a brown mast with scan arcs and a top loop; S-101/OpenCPN show a rectangular radar-scanner frame with top bar, vertical supports, and lower circular pivot.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RASCAN01 as the brown rectangular scanner-frame witness with top horizontal bar, vertical supports, and lower pivot circle; remove the broadcast-arc motif.

verdicts.expected: RASCAN11 is conspicuous radar scanner. It is used as a conspicuous radar scanner. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black mast with scan arcs and top loop; the conspicuous reference uses the black rectangular scanner-frame structure with lower pivot circle.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RASCAN11 as the black conspicuous radar-scanner frame with top bar, vertical supports, and lower pivot circle; remove the broadcast-arc motif.

verdicts.expected: RCTLPT52 is recommended traffic direction between parts of a traffic separation scheme, or for ships not needing a deep water route. It is used as a recommended traffic direction between parts of a traffic separation scheme, or for ships not needing a deep water route. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Automated visual rerun pass only. No Chart No.1 exact-crop/manual final approval evidence is present, so final human approval remains blocked.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta dashed traffic-direction arrow. It differs in orientation/curvature from the vertical reference render, but preserves the route-direction class and dashed arrow semantics expected for an oriented traffic-direction symbol.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this automated visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: RDOCAL02 is radio calling-in point for traffic in one direction only. It is used as a radio calling-in point for traffic in one direction only. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a circled R with a right arrow; S-101/OpenCPN show a one-direction radio call-in point as a circle with a single triangular point, and AquaMap shows a call-in point without the R label/arrow enclosure.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RDOCAL02 as the one-direction radio call-in point witness: circle plus one triangular direction point; remove the R label, arrow, and outer sign circle.

verdicts.expected: RDOCAL03 is radio calling-in point for traffic in both directions. It is used as a radio calling-in point for traffic in both directions. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a circled R with bidirectional arrows; S-101/OpenCPN show the both-direction call-in point as a circle with opposed triangular points, not an R sign.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RDOCAL03 as the bidirectional radio call-in point witness with opposed triangular points around the circle; remove the R label, arrows, and enclosing sign circle.

verdicts.expected: RDOSTA02 is radio station. It is used as a radio station. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a radio mast/broadcast icon, but S-101/OpenCPN identify RDOSTA02 as a simple magenta circular radio-station point witness.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RDOSTA02 as the simple magenta radio-station circle/point witness from S-101/OpenCPN; do not use a mast or broadcast-wave icon.

verdicts.expected: RECDEF51 is recommended track as an area, direction not defined in data. It is used as a recommended track as an area, direction not defined in data. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta dashed arrow with a question mark; S-101/OpenCPN show a neutral/grey recommended-track line with a central unknown-direction question cue, not a one-way arrow.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RECDEF51 as the recommended-track line with the central unknown-direction question cue; remove the directional arrowhead and magenta dashed-arrow styling.

verdicts.expected: RECTRC55 is recommended two-way track as an area, not based on fixed marks. It is used as a recommended two-way track as an area, not based on fixed marks. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is a horizontal dashed two-way arrow; S-101/OpenCPN show the recommended two-way track as a vertical track line with central two-way chevrons.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RECTRC55 as the two-way recommended-track witness with a track line and central opposed chevrons; remove the standalone horizontal arrow treatment.

verdicts.expected: RECTRC56 is recommended two-way track as an area, based on fixed marks. It is used as a recommended two-way track as an area, based on fixed marks. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a horizontal two-way arrow with a center circle; the reference is a fixed-mark two-way track line/chevron witness, not a standalone arrow sign.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw RECTRC56 as the fixed-mark two-way recommended-track reference: track line plus opposed chevrons/fixed-mark cue at reference proportions; remove the standalone arrow sign.

verdicts.expected: RECTRC57 is recommended one-way track as an area, not based on fixed marks. It is used as a recommended one-way track as an area, not based on fixed marks. verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw RECTRC57 as the one-way recommended-track line witness with arrow/chevron on the track axis; remove the standalone horizontal dashed arrow.

verdicts.expected: RECTRC58 is recommended one-way track as an area, based on fixed marks. It is used as a recommended one-way track as an area, based on fixed marks. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
